title: HMRC annual report and accounts: 2024 to 2025 – technical notes
body: "These are all supplementary documents published with the HMRC Annual Report and Accounts: 2024 to 2025.  On this page you can read:    HMRC compliance yield: technical note Large business compliance: technical note Wealthy individuals and mid-sized business compliance: technical note Fraud Investigation Service: technical note Tax by different customer groups — 2024 to 2025   "
